_instructions: Редактируй этот файл — AI читает его при каждом ответе. После сохранения: npm run dev или redeploy на Vercel.
bio: Self-taught developer from Khiva, Uzbekistan. Started at Mbos company in Urgench, learning from zero: HTML, Django, React, Docker. Focuses on clean code, scalable architecture, and production-ready products. Loves music and coffee.

experience.details: Learned web development: HTML → Django → React → Docker.

projectsHighlight.name: Personal Portfolio
projectsHighlight.description: This site: React, themes, i18n, AI chat assistant.

projectsHighlight.name: Fullstack Web Platform
projectsHighlight.description: Django REST + React + PostgreSQL — business logic and clean API design.

projectsHighlight.name: API & Docker workflow
projectsHighlight.description: Containerized backend, env-based config, deployment-ready setup.

extra: Kamron is 18, from Khiva. He plans to grow as a developer. Contact prefers Telegram or Instagram @matkarimovff.

uz.greeting: Salom! Men Kamron Matkarimov portfelidagi AI yordamchiman. Savolingiz bo'lsa, yozing — tajribasi, loyihalari yoki aloqa haqida yordam beraman. Telegram va Instagram: @matkarimovff.
uz.bio: Kamron Matkarimov — Xivadan (Xorazm) o'z-o'zidan o'rganilgan fullstack dasturchi, 18 yosh. Asosiy stack: Django, React, PostgreSQL, Docker. Mbos kompaniyasida (Urganch) noldan boshlab o'rgangan: HTML, Django, React, Docker.
uz.skillsSummary: Backend: Python, Django, DRF, PostgreSQL, Redis. Frontend: React, JavaScript. Devops: Docker, Git, Vercel.
uz.availability: Ha — ish va hamkorlik uchun Telegram @matkarimovff yoki Instagram @matkarimovff orqali yozish mumkin.
uz.projectsSummary: Shaxsiy portfel (React, mavzular, i18n, AI chat), Django REST + React platformalar, Docker bilan API va deploy.

ru.greeting: Здравствуйте! Я AI-ассистент портфолио Камрона Маткаримова. Спросите о его опыте, проектах или контактах — Telegram и Instagram: @matkarimovff.
